title: scolymus hispanicus
intro: Scolymus hispanicus, also known as the Globe Artichoke, is a thistle-like perennial plant native to the Iberian Peninsula and Mediterranean regions. The Globe Artichoke has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Globe Artichoke is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its potential health benefits and medicinal properties.
